{{Relic Infobox|Sword of Stone|2}}
{{R|Sword of Stone||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|The Sunken Statue|2}} event. Turns into {{R|Sword of Jade||2}} after defeating 5 Elites.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from the {{E|The Sunken Statue|2}} event by selecting {{Frame|Grab the Sword}}.
